title: Sengoku Jidai with friends
description: Modpack I made for me and my friends to play Sengoku Jidai mod together.
body: It's really a lightweight modpack, focused around [Sengoku Jidai](https://modrinth.com/mod/sengokujidaimod) mod. There are also some vanilla+ mods like [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds), or [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat), plus [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) and couple shaderpacks for cool visuals. There's nothing really more about it. Have fun!
